channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Blink-182 Release 25th Anniversary Edition of ‘Take Off Your Pants and Jacket’
item.description: 🎉 Celebrating 25 years of pop-punk perfection with Blink-182's special edition! Time to rock out like it's 2001! 🤘 #Blink182 #PunkRockIcons

item.title: Katy Perry and 10-Year-Old Singer Tius Bring Heartfelt ‘Wonder’ Performance to the World Cup
item.description: 🎶 Katy Perry & young talent Tius steal hearts with a ‘Wonder’-ful World Cup collab! Pure magic! ✨ #MusicMagic #KatyPerry #Tius

item.title: Charles Barkley Hopes ESPN Fires Him Over Cardi B Joke: ‘I Would Love To Get Fired, I’m Not Gon’ Lie’
item.description: 🔥 Looks like Charles Barkley is ready to go out in style with that Cardi B joke! 🎤 #MusicNews #CardiB #CharlesBarkley

item.title: Knicks’ Comeback Win Sparks Huge Spike in ‘Empire State of Mind’ Streaming
item.description: 🎶 Knicks' victory vibes have 'Empire State of Mind' on repeat! 🏀✨ Let's keep those streaming numbers soaring! 🚀🎧 #NewYorkAnthem #MusicMagic

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Sings Her ‘Stupid Song’ in Central Park and the Corner Store in New Music Video
item.description: 🎶 Olivia Rodrigo takes her catchy tunes to the streets! Watch her rock out in unexpected places in the new music video! 🎸 #OliviaRodrigo #NewMusicVideo
